---
title: Pull Request Template
version: 0.1.0
---

## Purpose of This PR

What does this PR accomplish?
Reference the issue it resolves:

Closes #`<issue-number>`

## Summary of Changes

Briefly describe the key changes in this PR.

- Added `<function or capability>`
- Updated `<module manifest / docs / tests>`
- Refactored `<internal helper>`

## Acceptance Criteria Checklist

Confirm that this PR meets the criteria defined in the issue.

- [ ] Function behavior implemented
- [ ] Edge cases handled
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Help documentation updated (PlatyPS)
- [ ] README updated (if user-facing)

## Testing Notes

- How was this tested?
  - Include commands, scenarios, or test data used.

## Documentation impact

- [ ] README
- [ ] PlatyPS source files
- [ ] Examples

## Additional Notes
